extracted_from.ter_pct: Total Expense Ratio ... Trojan Fund (Ireland) ... Class I EUR accumulation 1.61% ... Class X USD income 0.96% (For the financial period ended 31 July 2025)
extracted_from.admin_depositary_fees_pct: The Depositary receives an annual fee of up to 0.03% of the NAV of the sub-funds together with VAT, if any, thereon
other_fees: subject to an annual minimum fee of GBP 17,000 for each sub-fund.
Up to 3 June 2025, the Company operated an anti-dilution fee model of 0.5% on net subscription and net redemption of shares.

extraction_notes: TER values are for the financial period ended 31 July 2025 and vary by share class. The range is provided as the class with the most capital or retail equivalent could not be determined from the text. The anti-dilution levy was applicable up to 3 June 2025, but not applied from 1 February 2025 to 2 June 2025 or for the financial period ended 31 July 2024.
